page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.32xlarge is a general-purpose server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs, utilizing Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. With a 1:1 ratio of physical cores to vCPUs and no hyperthreading enabled, the instance provides dedicated, non-shared compute resources.

The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached volumes. For network connectivity, the instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.g7.32xlarge offers a high-density, dedicated resource profile suitable for enterprise workloads requiring predictable CPU performance without resource contention. The balanced memory-to-CPU ratio makes it well-suited for general-purpose enterprise applications, large-scale web serving, containerized microservices, and database workloads that rely on network-attached storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 128 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B vCPUs and physical cores on an x86_64 architecture. Operating at 2.7 GHz with a KVM hypervisor, it provides 512.0 GB of RAM, maintaining a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio. The instance does not include local storage or GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This hardware profile is designed for enterprise workloads requiring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead, making it suitable for large-scale web serving, database hosting, and containerized applications.

tagline: A dedicated 128-core x86_64 compute platform with balanced memory and high-speed network connectivity for demanding enterprise workloads.
